rationale: In the citing editorial, Durante and Laran (2016) is cited only once as part of a long grouped list of prior JMR studies from 2001-2020. The citation functions as an illustrative example that mitigation-related topics have been studied historically, specifically under negative-emotion research streams. The paper is not discussed individually, and its theory, findings, or methods are not used to build specific arguments, propositions, or analyses in the citing article.
